ul.li: begin_txn(): Creates BEGIN record with prev_lsn=0
write_txn(): Creates UPDATE record with prev_lsn = previous record's LSN
commit_txn(): Creates COMMIT record, marks transaction COMMITTED The prev_lsn chain links all records within a transaction, enabling efficient undo traversal during recovery.

g.text: serialize_update(lsn, txn_id, prev_lsn, page_id, offset, old_val, new_val)
